title: begonia bahakensis
intro: Begonia bahakensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is a type of rhizomatous begonia that is native to Malaysia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, providing health benefits such as relieving pain and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Begonia bahakensis include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and rhizome in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
